### Anthony Smith — 2024-06-26T00:50:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-being-in-the-sun-have-a-low-d3-level-still-being-sick-tells-me-you-got-a-vitamin-a-nnemf-problem.29068/post-336155>

Spirulina is vegan and high in B12 but I do not know if it is the right kind for what is being talked about.

### JanSz — 2024-06-26T01:49:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-being-in-the-sun-have-a-low-d3-level-still-being-sick-tells-me-you-got-a-vitamin-a-nnemf-problem.29068/post-336156>

> [Anthony Smith said:](/goto/post?id=336155)
>
> Spirulina is vegan and high in B12 but I do not know if it is the right kind for what is being talked about.

Spirulina is indeed a vegan source of nutrients and it does contain a form of vitamin B12.
[However, the B12 found in spirulina is often referred to as "pseudovitamin B12"](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/)[1](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/)[2](https://www.verywellhealth.com/spirulina-89079)[3](https://www.healthline.com/nutrition/10-proven-benefits-of-spirulina).
[This form is structurally similar to the B12 that our bodies need, but it’s not the same and is not effectively absorbed or utilized by our bodies](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/)[1](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/)[2](https://www.verywellhealth.com/spirulina-89079)[3](https://www.healthline.com/nutrition/10-proven-benefits-of-spirulina).

[Pseudovitamin B12 can bind to the same transport molecule as the real B12, but it doesn’t have the same vitamin effect on the body](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/)[1](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/).
[This can potentially lead to B12 deficiency, even when there is a good dietary supply of the vitamin, because the real vitamin simply cannot be transported and utilized](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/)[1](https://www.b12-vitamin.com/algae/).

[So, while spirulina has many health benefits and is a good source of other nutrients, it’s not a reliable source of effective vitamin B12, especially for those following a vegetarian or vegan diet](https://www.verywellhealth.com/spirulina-89079)[2](https://www.verywellhealth.com/spirulina-89079)[3](https://www.healthline.com/nutrition/10-proven-benefits-of-spirulina).

[It’s often recommended to **look for other sources or supplements for your B12 needs**](https://www.verywellhealth.com/spirulina-89079)[2](https://www.verywellhealth.com/spirulina-89079)[3](https://www.healthline.com/nutrition/10-proven-benefits-of-spirulina).

### JanSz — 2024-06-26T01:58:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-being-in-the-sun-have-a-low-d3-level-still-being-sick-tells-me-you-got-a-vitamin-a-nnemf-problem.29068/post-336157>

You
I do not want any fortified foods.
What are the natural foods that vegans eat that naturally contain b12

Copilot
I understand your preference for natural sources of B12.
However, it’s important to note that vitamin B12 is naturally found in significant amounts primarily in animal products.
[The bacteria that produce vitamin B12 are found in the soil and in the guts of animals, which is why animal products are rich in B12](https://www.bing.com/aclick?ld=e8aTWjn_clblrTWz1o5ziiGzVUCUzY5xnxJ7oLb-J5MPhH1glL6O0VbRfp66HS6a7l1CjUbGih2CktAtMPX5moz2oELWfTemrpD8liiaFmYrKbb9O-5wdLFR77Ba1CcEAj7dQvT5Hc_p9x1j8pKchKKyT-5tvIo7OHfTQfd3Bf0RN577Gm&&rlid=281ed6f2ca45166c85b1b08980e6b914)[1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/).
For vegans, finding natural, non-fortified sources of B12 can be challenging.
[Some plant foods have been found to contain traces of B12, but the amounts are usually not sufficient to meet the daily requirements](https://www.bing.com/aclick?ld=e8aTWjn_clblrTWz1o5ziiGzVUCUzY5xnxJ7oLb-J5MPhH1glL6O0VbRfp66HS6a7l1CjUbGih2CktAtMPX5moz2oELWfTemrpD8liiaFmYrKbb9O-5wdLFR77Ba1CcEAj7dQvT5Hc_p9x1j8pKchKKyT-5tvIo7OHfTQfd3Bf0RN577Gm&&rlid=281ed6f2ca45166c85b1b08980e6b914)[1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/).
Here are a few options:

1.  [**Tempeh**: This fermented soy product may contain some B12](https://www.bing.com/aclick?ld=e8aTWjn_clblrTWz1o5ziiGzVUCUzY5xnxJ7oLb-J5MPhH1glL6O0VbRfp66HS6a7l1CjUbGih2CktAtMPX5moz2oELWfTemrpD8liiaFmYrKbb9O-5wdLFR77Ba1CcEAj7dQvT5Hc_p9x1j8pKchKKyT-5tvIo7OHfTQfd3Bf0RN577Gm&&rlid=281ed6f2ca45166c85b1b08980e6b914) [1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/)[3](https://plantbasedrds.com/blog/b12-vegan-sources/).

1.  [**Nori Seaweed and Chlorella**: Certain types of seaweed and algae, such as nori and chlorella, can contain B12](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/) [1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/).

1.  [**Shiitake Mushrooms**: Some types of mushrooms, like shiitake, may contain small amounts of B12](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/) [1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/).

[However, the B12 content in these foods can vary greatly, and they should not be relied upon as the sole source of B12](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/) [1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/)[3](https://plantbasedrds.com/blog/b12-vegan-sources/).
[It’s also important to note that the bioavailability of B12 in these foods (i.e., how much of the B12 your body can actually absorb and use) is not well-studied](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/).
[Given the challenges of getting sufficient B12 from plant-based foods, most health professionals recommend that vegans take a B12 supplement to ensure they get enough of this essential nutrient](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/) [1](https://www.veganfoodandliving.com/vegan-diet/the-truth-about-b12-and-where-to-get-it-on-a-vegan-diet/)[2](https://www.freshnlean.com/blog/vegan-b12-sources/)[3](https://plantbasedrds.com/blog/b12-vegan-sources/).
As always, it’s best to consult with a healthcare provider or a registered dietitian for personalized advice.
They can help you determine the best way to meet your B12 needs based on your diet, lifestyle, and individual health circumstances.

\=====================

# Thread: Hello from TX! Happy to be here- short intro and I have 1 question
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-from-tx-happy-to-be-here-short-intro-and-i-have-1-question.29075/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### sheas — 2024-06-26T05:07:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-from-tx-happy-to-be-here-short-intro-and-i-have-1-question.29075/post-336158>

I don’t know how I have gone this long without ever hearing of Dr. Jack Kruse. But I guess the quote “When the student is ready the teacher will appear” rings true….One day when scrolling through Rick Rubin’s podcast I found one with Dr. Jack Kruse. Read the blurb and thought it sounded right up my alley. And it was! This is how I found you Dr. Jack.

About 3 years ago maybe 4, I noticed a cognitive decline so much that I was getting scared. Also my hair was falling out in chunks. I went down all of the rabbit holes with functional docs putting me on BHRT and buckets of supplements (literally!), intermittent fasting. Wore a glucose monitor which was interesting since I don't eat sugar, starting cold plunging with my DIY set up. But the thing that not one person talked about was circadian biology and light, blue light toxicity. I gladly stopped the bucket full of supplements, but I still do CT and BHRT (but have been reducing bhrt). And I upped my time in the cold plunge tub to about 10-15 minutes a day at 48 deg, almost every day.

I am thrilled to be here and learn more. I work outside for a living so I thought I was ahead of the game but have been doing it all wrong. So far I have incorporated going outside when the sun rises (moved my computer to my back porch), ditching the sun glasses, eating an early protein and fat breakfast, wearing red glasses at night, yellow blue blockers during the day if I am on my computer. My hair has grown back almost to the thickness I had before, and the bald spot is almost gone. I feel much sharper like my old self, I wake up as soon as the sun begins to peak over the horizon feeling energized and ready to get up. That has NEVER happened before. I have a lot of white spots on my shins as I am getting more tan. And brown spots on my calves but assuming that will die down some as my body repairs. Getting blood work soon to compare. I want to do a private consult but not sure where I can find the information of what all blood work to get. I saw one question about the 23 and me test so I will do that.

My question is where can I find info on what other blood work to get to be fully prepared for a private consult. I assume full thyroid, hormones, D, B, leptin, (iron?). And I am sure it is on here somewhere I just haven’t found yet. Sorry but a forum like this is new to me and not sure how to navigate it.

Thank you and looking forward in this journey! PS- been a BTC maxi and DCA’ing since 2019. And have been an RFK fan for a while.

### Jack Kruse — 2024-06-27T01:26:14+0300

after death we are (non-judging) witnesses (good news, we are still there)

Proces of producing ATP goes thru synthesis and a breakdown of about 20 liters (or kilograms) daily.

(H + O) (or variety of O, and variety of H) (D) are variety of waters.
(H and O) is not a water (but same atoms are involved).

Other antonyms for synthesis could include disorganization, division, separation, and sundering.
..

Help other people.

Dr Jack Kruse has suggesting to dr Polack some water tests but IRC he would do it, but lack of funding prevents him.

Suggestions in these directions from Jack is to have a waterfall in your surroundings even if it is mechanical/electric.
\============

From what Veda talks, I have misgivings now of what water to use myself.
I drink now daily one liter (2 bottles) of DDW-25.
The rest ot the water that I drink is RO water I buy from Costco.
Reason for that particular water is because of Jack discussions that started on end of 2017 about deuterium depleted water. My RO has deuterium content lower than average water.
There is a Hungarian PHD Somylai.
He studied this type (DDW) of water as cancer preventing. Eventually he asked Hungarian doctor for help, dr Boros. Dr Boros as a kid, lived in Hungary near dr Albert Szent-Györgyi who invented Krebs cycle.
Because of that neighborhood dr Boros started studying medicine (in that direction).

I’ve been following Veda for a while. She has some interesting webinars where she brings in other interesting people. One she had Mauro Zappaterra who I also follow because of his work with CSF. I was hooked after she did a before craniosacral and after craniosacral freezing of a person’s urine and how it went from chaotic to structured geometric forms. She also has amniotic fluid she did her freezing with and it’s really fascinating. She did say that when you start this you have to build up your relationship with water. So for example she gets much more out of her freezing images now then when she first started. She just posted a video the other day of a friend who did reiki via distance work on a glass of water and showed how its structure changed. I love this kind of stuff because I am a biodynamic craniosacral practitioner and we focus on the fluid body.
I drink reverse osmosis water but remineralize it with some trace mineral drops or that Quinton isotonic. Then I stir it with my anelema wand. Those supposedly bring the water back to a coherent state. There is a difference in the taste and it almost has a spark to it. I didn't tell my husband the first time I did it, and he asked if I got the same water because it tasted better.

# Thread: FQ's, nnEMF & the 55th Latitude.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 31
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Garry Kirk — 2024-06-27T18:39:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336195>

Hi,

My name is Garry and I am a 6’ 45 year old male living at the 55th latitude in Glasgow, Scotland. I first came across Jacks work referenced probably about 6-7 years ago now within a paradigm called applied movement neurology.

3.5 years ago I was prescribed the fluoroquinolone antibiotic moxyfloxacin and have never been the same since. 2.5-3 years ago I joined the patreon blog and really began to pay attention in more detail to Jacks work. Since then, I have watched every podcast, but have been infrequent and haphazard in reading blog posts. I only recently subscribed as a gold member and really wish I had done so sooner. Currently devouring all Q&A’s and starting to read blog posts from the beginning.

At the time I took this prescription, I would be considered to be chronically abusing technology, had wifi on in the house, wasn’t properly mitigating blue light, had been Vegan for maybe 1.5 years and it was winter solstice here in Scotland, so maybe 7 hours of daylight or something each day. I was also going through a rough time and was particularly stressed. January the 4th symptoms were my brain stopped working properly- that’s the only way I can put it. Couldn’t read a paragraph and retain the information present in it, couldn't concentrate or even properly string a sentence together, I was completely fatigued within walking 0.5-1 miles and my heart was pounding in my chest, so much so and because I lived alone and was deeply worried about how I felt, I went to hospital where I was told my heart was fine, my thyroid was fine, my bloods were ‘perfect’ and there was nothing wrong with my heart. I was on an ECG over night, had a scan of my chest, but no echo. BP etc everything else fine. I was not fine! I was destroyed. Fortunately I never suffered any ruptures, but have since and to this day been constantly dealing with niggles from any training I do. People say it’s age, but I know my body and it felt like I’d aged 20 years! I know how strong I am and how I perform athletically and this was totally something else.

I changed all bulbs in house, bought blue blockers, installed IRIS, blue blocking screen protector, started getting morning light and soon realised how chronically sleep deprived I was as well.

All carbs and coffee made things substantially worse. I stopped drinking caffeinated coffee and started to eat fish again, I naturally moved back towards a fish based paleo diet as I used to eat paleo previously. I noticed that this was reducing palpitations due to less carbs. After about 6 months I returned to work (I’m a full time firefighter of 20 years now)

Since then I have developed tinnitus & raynauds in hands, I get niggles very easy when I train and the issue I have been dealing with constantly since is in my chest I feel like I always have palpitations. I would say they were at 11 when I went into hospital and they fluctuate now between 0 (RARELY) and a 4.

They can get quite bad and they have on occasions almost subsided completely. I used to meditate daily and have been doing so for at least 7-8 years now, but I eventually stopped that for a while as all I could feel and so in turn focus on was my heart, which really only served to create even more anxiety.

I now and for probably 2-2.5 years eat organic organ and muscle meat, mutton and beef, make all my own bone broth and drink that daily, eat seaweed, eat seafood, eat seasonally (KETO in winter), tallow, butter, ghee, filter water, take no mouth wash or fluoride based toothpastes, use cold showers (as I don’t have a bath) do CT in lochs here when I can, but the big thing recently I have done is to mitigate NnEMF. Why the f&%K did I not get to this sooner?!?! NnEMF seems to be having a huge impact on me also. What I notice with cold showers is I feel like I can breathe better when I come out of them. The shrinking of respiratory proteins? Electrons and protons are moving better as a result of the cold?? This is a direct subjective perception of breathing more easily and more fully.

I bought a magnetic and electric field meter and measured my laptop …Off the chart!! I had maintained that I felt significantly worse on my laptop and even worse on it when plugged in and so I had already bought and moved to a desktop, all hard wired and wifi off. After measuring the laptop I confirmed that where it measured so high, right under my hand, was where I would swear I could feel it when I was using it.

Recently as well I have been feeling at times like I am going to die, I wake up and it’s like my chest feels weak, I have always said like a terrible hangover, it’s like waking up with a hangover every morning, despite not having drank any alcohol for 3.5 years. So whilst things got better they started to feel like they were getting worse again. I seen Jack do a podcast with the decentralised radio guys and then watched a podcast they done with an EMF guy and so started to plug my phone directly into the router hard wired as he mentioned on that ( I didn’t know you could do that) and whilst on airplane mode as well and I started to notice that I wasn’t feeling quite so bad. I bought a safe and sound 2 meter and was that an eye opener or what!. I have mitigated everything I can and created an environment in my house where the safe and sound is green, below 10 microwatts per sq/m and then last Saturday do I not start registering a blast of nnemf every 4-5 seconds coming from a 5g tower, newly installed within this last month. Now my house is being irradiated, against my will, without my consent and just when I’m thinking I might be able to get on top of this, back to the start. To add insult to injury, my studio where my business is located and where I fit people to bicycles is surrounded by other businesses and wifi routers and has quite high readings too. Not only that, the guys at the fire station have fitted routers in almost every room and so I feel like now I have some sort of idea of what is going on, I can’t even get my home down to levels where I am recovering properly in low safe levels of EMF.

All along I have been wondering what is wrong with me. Is there a weakness in my heart, is it my heart? is my autonomic nervous system damaged?, is it CN10, is there neurological damage, is it a change in interoceptive awareness? I listen to the Q&A’s and everyone knows what’s wrong with them. People look at me and I look 100% healthy, in fact, I probably look better right now than I ever have done. I’m lean, haven’t drank any alcohol in 3.5 years, train and eat well. I have maintained my training, although recently have even been wondering if this is doing me more harm than good, yet I do not feel normal inside.

I also used to suffer SAD as well. I never really realised just how bad, until a friend said to me one time, in all the people I have ever met, I have never met anyone that suffers so bad in the winter as you. I began thinking about this and I truly despise the winters here. My maternal haplotype is T2b3 and so for the last few winters I have been heading to the Canary Islands for 10 days every 7-8 weeks. I can normally get away 3x p/winter. The best I have felt in that time was Feb 2023 coming back from Tenerife. I am now thinking this is maybe to do with the Volcano there perhaps. I am in the sun and in the sea all day every day when I am away.

So here are my issues…

1\. What is really going on?
2\. What to do?

1\. Is it redox? Did the fluoride destroy the ability to hold charge and thus create leaky semiconductors? Am I constantly hypoxic as a result of the nnEMF? Can I just not fully recharge my mammalian battery? Is the answer ketosis + CT + strong UV + control NNEMF ? Can the battery be fully recharged again? … Or is there damage to the nervous system and/or brain? Is it both? Can I test for this? Are there relevant labs that would help? Do I have to move abroad, can I move house into the country here, move my fit studio there so I sleep and work one of my jobs in a controlled electromagnetic environment, do CT every day in a tub and maybe get a strong red light and get better? Whilst getting away 3-4 x p year for as much sun a s possible? …reason being..

2\. I have 20 years in the fire service, the quickest I can retire, lift my pension and get the f&%k out of here is in another 5 years. If I quit now, I can’t get my pension till age 60 (for all it will be) and to retire with a full pension I need to do the full 30 years, which right now doesn’t seem like an option at all for me. So an option is to try for promotion and get a couple of ranks in the next 5 year to try get out at 25 years with what a firefighter would be leaving with in 30. Then get the hell out of here. I will not stay here! Brexit has also screwed things up in a big way too!

My business is fitting people to bicycles, so wherever there are cyclists I can do this. This is a transferable skill. My girlfriend is actually Spanish, from the island of Mallorca, she is a veterinary orthopaedic surgeon, she has transferable skills for sure! One issue is she isn’t quite as keen on the heat as me. I absolutely love it, she doesn’t like Mediterranean summers, but she does like the countryside here and I think having had her eyes opened dramatically in terms of nnEMF would be more than happy living in the country here. This gets me thinking, maybe I can sell up my business stock, give up the studio, take a year out from fire service, leave my belongings in storage at hers and head to Nicaragua for 3 month VISA then maybe El Salvador for 3 month and so on and try to build up the redox if that is the best thing. There are tonnes of variables that I don’t control in that hypothetical scenario, that is the only issue, but it might mean there is a way…

I have been buying btc. I don’t have a lot at all, but I mean when I look at Nicaragua, I think it would be possible to retire and move there on what I will hopefully have in 5 years. The UK is out, it’s a cesspit anyway and so I am here right now through necessity and Brexit more than anything else. The way I feel sometimes though, I wonder if I have 5 years, I wonder if I have to just sacrifice all of these things, roll the dice and try and get out of here… I think that is where maybe a community like this could help.

I suppose this is a condensed journal of the last 3.5 years of my life. I will add more as I progress.

Cheers,

Garry.

### JanSz — 2024-06-27T19:15:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336199>

> [Garry Kirk said:](/goto/post?id=336195)
>
> My maternal haplotype is T2b3 and so for the last few winters I have been heading to the Canary Islands for 10 days every 7-8 weeks. I can normally get away 3x p/winter. The best I have felt in that time was Feb 2023 coming back from Tenerife. I am now thinking this is maybe to do with the Volcano there perhaps.

I do not think your haplotype is a part of your problems.
I think that you are (more than most) highly sensitive to nnEMF.

Move to El Salvator asap.

\=========
I know it will be hard to do.
Wish that there were more studies that are specifically directed toward your type of sensitivities and how to deal with them without destroying that person's life, family life, and everything else.
It is hard to imagine that everybody in the world will be able to move to ES.

//////////////

sounds like your job is forcing you to trade Time for money. I hope you have more time left 5 years from now.

Currently devouring all Q&A’s and starting to read blog posts from the beginning.
>
> At the time I took this prescription, I would be considered to be chronically abusing technology, had wifi on in the house, wasn’t properly mitigating blue light, had been Vegan for maybe 1.5 years and it was winter solstice here in Scotland, so maybe 7 hours of daylight or something each day. I was also going through a rough time and was particularly stressed. January the 4th symptoms were my brain stopped working properly- that’s the only way I can put it. Couldn’t read a paragraph and retain the information present in it, couldn't concentrate or even properly string a sentence together, I was completely fatigued within walking 0.5-1 miles and my heart was pounding in my chest, so much so and because I lived alone and was deeply worried about how I felt, I went to hospital where I was told my heart was fine, my thyroid was fine, my bloods were ‘perfect’ and there was nothing wrong with my heart. I was on an ECG over night, had a scan of my chest, but no echo. BP etc everything else fine. I was not fine! I was destroyed. Fortunately I never suffered any ruptures, but have since and to this day been constantly dealing with niggles from any training I do. People say it’s age, but I know my body and it felt like I’d aged 20 years! I know how strong I am and how I perform athletically and this was totally something else.

I stopped drinking caffeinated coffee and started to eat fish again, I naturally moved back towards a fish based paleo diet as I used to eat paleo previously. Hi Gary, I may be the EMF guy you heard on the Decentralized Radio show. I’m a fellow Brit but I live in the USA.

The Safe and Sound Pro2 is a great meter to find, measure and mitigate RF.
Have you measured the electric (50Hz) and magnetic fields in your space? All nnEMF is cumulative, so all the different types add up and affect your sensitivity. We have found people who turn off the circuits in their sleep area at night and set up an EMF mitigated sleep sanctuary do very much better during the day because we are so much more sensitive to EMF at night. Check out [www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse](http://www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse) for details and idea and contact me if you have questions.

Do the math, how much pension will you have in 5 or 10 years - what will your extra medical bills be if you stay where you are for another 5 or 10 years.

I just spent a week in El Salvador, haven’t felt that good in a long time (not that I felt bad before). Get down there (at least for a visit) as soon as you can and see how you feel.

### Garry Kirk — 2024-06-28T23:43:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336251>

Thanks for the replies guys. I think Jack mentioned my haplotype in a response a couple of years back JanSz. That, plus vegan diet, plus FQ = bad times!

Re: Time for money. This is difficult, because finding a way to live until I can get away permanently seems like the only way I can sustain getting away permanently when the time comes. I am teaching my 18yo daughter about btc right now so if I don't have time left, she at least has something.
I know in Q&A's Jack you sometimes say to people try 3 months away, try 6 months and to some you need to move away and stay away. Can you elude to what you think is going on here with me and what sort of time frame is likely to help?. I know the Q&A's have been busy this last couple of months and wanted to try and ask questions here really to save time during them. In the meantime I will start looking at the El Salvador threads.

Anthony, Thank you. I am wondering whether to perhaps try and shield from these 5g pulses in the bedroom tbh, but that is something that I wonder whether it is worth it or not. If it is possible then I will do it I think.
I measured about 20 - 25nT MAX in my bedroom. Killing the lights on this floor and ring main reduces that reading to between 7-10nT. The electric field with the meter grounded is 1V/M. My meter doesn't register below 1 V/m. Sometimes it will jump between 1 and 2. I'm a mid terrace here and so have neighbours either side. I find magnetic fields interesting. When my washing machine is on I'm reading 500-600nT in the next room, during particular parts of the cycle.

re pension. Like everything in this country right now, it's a shambles. I literally cannot get a reliable and accurate prediction due to constant legal battles and court cases with the government regarding attacks on public pensions since 2008... which doesn't help tbh.

I think I can definitely get 3 weeks later this year, maybe 4 if I really pushed it, to travel further afield than the canaries. I could potentially do that 3 x p/yr as well, so I will start planning for El Salvador now I think.

G.

My girlfriend is actually Spanish, from the island of Mallorca, she is a veterinary orthopaedic surgeon, she has transferable skills for sure! One issue is she isn’t quite as keen on the heat as me. I absolutely love it, she doesn’t like Mediterranean summers, but she does like the countryside here and I think having had her eyes opened dramatically in terms of nnEMF would be more than happy living in the country here. This gets me thinking, maybe I can sell up my business stock, give up the studio, take a year out from fire service, leave my belongings in storage at hers and head to Nicaragua for 3 month VISA then maybe El Salvador for 3 month and so on and try to build up the redox if that is the best thing. There are tonnes of variables that I don’t control in that hypothetical scenario, that is the only issue, but it might mean there is a way…
>
> I have been buying btc. I don’t have a lot at all, but I mean when I look at Nicaragua, I think it would be possible to retire and move there on what I will hopefully have in 5 years. The UK is out, it’s a cesspit anyway and so I am here right now through necessity and Brexit more than anything else. The way I feel sometimes though, I wonder if I have 5 years, I wonder if I have to just sacrifice all of these things, roll the dice and try and get out of here… I think that is where maybe a community like this could help.
>
> I suppose this is a condensed journal of the last 3.5 years of my life. I will add more as I progress.
>
> Cheers,
>
> Garry.

Hi Garry,
I note you have investigated the EMF issues. On a different note - have you experienced any major traumatic event in your life? Are you overexercising?

### Garry Kirk — 2024-06-30T14:28:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336297>

Hi Mat.l,

Thanks for your message, define traumatic, ha!. I mean, this is another area I am interested in and do have some practical experience with, but I feel like I have been gaslighted since this all happened with people saying things like "it'll be stress" etc, from friends, colleagues and loved ones which is not easy to deal with tbh, because I know the difference between stress and how I feel as I have experienced extreme stress in my life. Plus they haven't sat reading papers on what these drugs do. They just say the first thing that comes into their head. What happens though, is after this amount of time you end up questioning yourself, which is not a good situation to be in. I do believe this is a probability game, perhaps the issues I have had have lead to the FQ's targeting this area, I don't know, they say with this shit it will hunt out and make worse areas of weakness, maybe that's my nervous system, but my life is stable these days, so in terms of trauma and stress, at 45 years, I've had my fair share, that's for sure but I don't think it's that.

The symptoms aren't like how you would understand palpitations, ie - adrenaline has kicked in in a dangerous situation or I have had a phone call that has left me angry and I need to calm down, they're there during meditation, last thing at night, first thing in the morning, but I am noticing that nnEMF, electric and magnetic fields definitely have an impact and I do think it was a case of a perfect storm when all this happened. A punch in the mouth for sure. It's hard to describe really, whilst I no longer suffer from depression really, there is a veil over my everyday existence which sort of sounds like... I don't know how much time I have got left. I do not feel normal and I have not felt normal since I took those tablets. It's all I can think about really.

Interestingly, this did start when exercising during the course of antibiotics, but I wouldn't say I was over exercising, neither then nor now, but like I say, recently I have been thinking about stopping any strength/resistance work altogether and going back to the bike, dropping 10-15kg muscle and focussing on cardiovascular fitness. The reason I moved away from the bike is how time consuming it is and I wasn't exercising enough due to working the two jobs so I started training at work and then as and when I can really. Maybe the bike is a better shout though. The exercising aspect of this has been on my mind, I have to say, especially after what Jack has been saying about hypertrophy, energy and ageing, also strength work and the nervous system go hand in hand, so yeah this is definitely a subject for debate. I have never got back to the athlete I was mate, that's for sure, nowhere near it and I don't beat myself up about that or anything, I've accepted there's bigger issues at hand.

G.

Hi Garry,
No worries. I'm not dismissing the fact that you believe you have been floxed - my intention was to help you identify or accept that other factors may be hindering your recovery. In my opinion it is important to look at this holistically, if your system is not in a good state, identifying any further sources energy leakage / depletion would be very important to assist with your recovery. Trauma impacts us in very different ways - it may be running in the background and come out even more when your system is run down. It may also influence your decisions such as keeping busy, exercising and knowing when to pull back. Sometimes when we are not doing well - the opinions from people close to us as an observer may be useful in considering other elements too. E.g. if you are under a lot of stress and dealing with the effects of being floxed, then any further stress on your system is going to be detrimental to your recovery.

Based on your posts - you should consider only doing very light short duration exercise (e.g. walking or easy body weight movement) (only while grounded/barefoot & outside ) at least you will be getting electrons from the earth and not doing more damage whilst your system is in this state.

Look at how many hours you are working each week and what time of day / night you are carrying out this work. If it is not consistent with the circadian clock, then look at ways to change this.

Try to tune in with your body throughout the day / night to figure out what it needs and how certain things may affect your energy levels & overall well being on a daily basis. Just experiment with different things and see what helps and keep a log of it. Maybe a diary? This could be how you feel after you pull back on your exercise & only exercise outdoors whilst grounded e.g. do you feel better psychically?

How's your sleep - look at how you can improve it if it is not good. E.g. meditation, wind down routines, no ALAN, limiting nnEMF etc..

Get an EMF consult and have your area checked, it may also be of benefit to check your workplaces also and take the necessary action / steps to better the situation (as best as you can).

Look at getting to a lower latitude when possible to get stronger UV and build melanin to bridge the gap.

Research vagus nerve exercises and experiment with them to see if this helps to quiet symptoms down a bit especially when trying to relax etc..

Have a look at other environmental hazards that you may be exposed to as being a full time fire fighter which may be adding stress to your system further. I'm not up scratch on the regs over in Scotland. My background is fire safety engineering in Australia. I assume you have also restricted the use of AAAF with PFAS's. Do you have regular training exercises - do you use just training foams (fluorine free)?

All the best with your recovery.

Mat

### Garry Kirk — 2024-07-02T15:06:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336422>

> [Saichi said:](/goto/post?id=336337)
>
> What levels are you measuring now on your Safe and Sound meter in your home?
>
> How much time do you spend at the fire station?

Hi Saichi,

At home, it's not too bad. In my bedroom green flashing so below 1 microwatt per sq/M. Upstairs in liv rm, higher with TV and things on, but still it can be anywhere from 10-40 for example. The thing is I can control this with switching things off, keeping remotes away, Apple TV unplugged etc but it's this pulsing from the tower that is the issue. The tower that has been erected in the last month looks like the jagged looking one in the attached photo below. The smooth cotton bud shaped one is also along the road, but has been there for longer.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

The weird thing is that when I am in the bedroom and S&S2 is measuring 0.439 for example and blinking green, the pulsing from the tower every 4 to 5 seconds is say 40 microwatts per sw/M. If I can find a part of the house where the reading is higher, let's say 70-90, the pulsing is much higher, it can pule from 500 - 1500 or sometimes even up to 2500. It seems to be the higher the ambient reading is, the bigger the pulse reads which kind of makes me wonder what is going on. Is this reading accurate, is it reading an amplification of a signal. It's quite strange. It's pissing me right off though because were it not for these towers, I would be able to really have quite a safe space to sleep in.

The fire station is 2 x 10hr dayshifts, followed bt 2 x 14hr nightshifts. I have measured in there now and the dormitory is fine with router off, yes they have a router in the sleeping area. I've even taken to hiding it. I also have an office downstairs which is green as well, reading maybe 4-10 and outside out back is good too. It's all the routers in the station, so the meter is helping. I now know what is going on and where which is really beneficial.The guys will sit in the TV room which is very small, 4ft from the router - 4 or 5 guys, all with phones on etc. You can't unsee this shit!

I am currently going through a promotion process. I will find out this week whether I pick up a promotion and am moving to a new station. In light of this new information I am thinking a move could be worse if there is 5g where I move to and that where I am could be made a lot better, so we'll see. If I don't get the move, I think I will speak with my gaffer and explain the situation. I think I can offer a solution for all really. No routers in the dorm at night, hard wire the fire sticks, have one wireless router in the lecture room where people can sit and use it if they need to and all other ones switched off. That way Im not pissing off the entire station either when other watches are on. This is the solution for all. Technically there should be no routers, no phone usage as they should be in lockers etc anyway so that's not the road anyone wants to go down really.

I am tempted to actually knock on peoples doors that live close to those towers and show them what is going on. I kind of feel like there's an awareness issue. I am looking at this like smoking. People can choose to smoke, so switch on wifi, bluetooth and 4g on their phone and walk around with it in their pocket and sleep with it at their head etc and kill themselves, but they can no longer smoke next to you in the airport, in the plane,, in the bar, in the workplace etc. I think if ppl understood the phone is smoking, 5g, wifi, use of tech in confined spaces is the equivalent of passive smoking, being irradiated against our will, maybe then they would wake up. It's public awareness, but then ... there is the addiction aspect!

### Garry Kirk — 2024-07-02T15:58:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336430>

Hi Mat,

Thank you for your response. No I know you were trying to help. The thing is that any amount of stress does amplify things as well of course, so I have taken appropriate measures in all these places as well.

I do think there may be validity in stopping training, but it's the giving up what you have worked so hard for that is the hardest thing to deal with as well. It takes so long to build and not so long to break it all down. That's the headfuck really.

It's funny you say. I do have a large park close by that is quiet with woodland walk, despite my location. I took my meter my walk the other day and checked it all out. Turns out the large open park isn't great, I thought it might be problematic actually, but I have found a decent sized area in it where I can get the safe and sound down to safe levels, 4 8 microwatts per sq/M and so I have been walking up there, taking my shoes off and grounding the last few days around that spot. As Jack says.. when you know better you do better! The meters are a great investment and I am glad I finally took the plunge with them.

I have been wearing blue blockers in the station for 3 years now lol. The guys think I'm nuts, but I now notice the odd red phone screen on the nightshifts  so some of it is sinking in now. There's a saying.. "when you throw enough shit at the wall, eventually some of it will stick" When I come on shift I switch off a load of the lights and open windows etc lol ...they all just accept it now. When we are turned out during the night I have my blockers on and they only come off if they really need to.

It's funny you mention the vagus nerve. I was at the Foo Fighters gig at Hampden the other night and the bass was insane. I haven't felt bass like that since I was a young guy listening to techno in clubs, but it was vibrating in my chest, in my legs, in my brain.. crazy! But weirdly I was in a stadium with I dunno 30-40k people, all with their phones on and the next day I didn't feel too bad at all (on the scale of things) I did wonder if maybe there is something in the bass frequencies that can have a therapeutic effect. Tbh, I have never looked into this!

I moved to the station I am at about 6-7 years ago to get away from the busy nights and fires tbh. I once got chatting to a firefighter who had a fire engineering degree at a fatality I was at and he was telling me then about all the data. I decided at that point I was moving stations and starting to approach things differently. As a service we are probably now, in the last couple of years, really now getting on top of it in terms of a broader awareness throughout personnel, terrible really!

Thank you for your comments. I have been thinking and the plan is to sell what I have. I don't own a property, but I do have a little cash tied up in the business so it's a case of trying to liquidate all that, my possessions ...so car, bikes, guitars and hifi really and then take a year out from work and head to the tropics. If I could liquidate everything at the click of a finger that would be great but it might take a little more time. I'm gonna split it btc and cash and then go. I think I'm going to go regardless of whether my work agree to the career break or not, so serious measures, but tbh when I am away I can work on my website, blogs, making my site translatable in Spanish for example, learn Spanish, focus on recovery and then see where we are at after that. So hopefully I can make this happen. Tbh it has made me think about a lot of things. The business in its form isn't the best either, it's tying, in both location and what it allows me to do. Fine if you want to be here, which long term I definitely don't anyway! I have money tied up in stock when it should be in btc..All this will seem extreme to ppl I know but I couldn't give a fuck tbh. To me it feels kind of liberating. I look at it like... Priority no 1: I need to get healthy. The 10 years experience I have fitting ppl to bicycles ain't going anywhere. I would be what you would call a decentralised bike filter anyway as my ideas about fitting tend not to run in line with the mainstream, centralised ideas that heavily populate instagram and the cycling world. It would give me time to solidify those ideas and bring them to my website as well and look at a new model going forward. I will have the money I need to go and everything else in btc.. It sounds like the best idea yet!

Cheers,

G.

Cold + epi palo + control nnemf (and ALAN) + LIGHT/melanin =

This is really interesting. Feb 23 I stayed in (winter) Ketosis when I was in Tenerife, I was up the volcano twice in 10 days and was living at sea level at the bottom of it, I was on the black sand every day and also In the cold water for about 1-1.5hrs every day as well. I can be in Ketosis and getting cold here yes, as I was, but it doesn't work the same way without the light controller... LIGHT & melanin is key!

I am going to try and get to El Salvador for 6 months, since I can travel for 180 days without a Visa. I'm not sure I can manage much more than that. We will see. It's likely not enough, but I should be able to make a good dent in things all the same. There is a possibility of even extending on that timeframe, but will need to see. It will take some time and planning and for me to make some sacrifices in the meantime here, but I know I have to try and make this happen.

Oh, .... and - hypertrophy too!

G.

Turns out I got a promotion, so I think the plan will be to take it, run my business stock down, raise cash, give up the studio and get away for 6 months, then when I come back possibly relocate closer to the new fire station, which also means I can likely get out of the town and into the country as the new station is in the suburbs of the city already. I'd then open the business up again closer to new home.

I have looked at the canopies yes, but it's the whole house really and I think the answer for me is to get out of here and to where there's no 5g and to where I can measure and control things. I will use meters obviously when looking at places to live. It is the earthing of the canopy that I was a little apprehensive about, plugging into the houses earth. Do you find that works OK? It's just there is quite a large expense to this (full shielding etc) and my feeling is I'd rather just be away from it completely.

### Jack Kruse — 2024-07-05T18:17:28+0300

### Mat.I — 2024-07-07T08:48:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336787>

> [Mat.I said:](/goto/post?id=336768)
>
> Hi Garry,
> Are you in a detached dwelling? Or share a common wall with your neighbour (e.g. townhouse). What mag meter are you using? How old is the place?

Hi again Garry,
Having logged on again and re-read your information - I note you mentioned fuses you are removing and the fact you have adjoining neighbours on both sides. The fact that you mention fuses this indicates that it is likely quite an old electrical installation with no CB or RCD's etc.. Which if in fact this is correct you will find your only earth bond is likely a metallic water pipe which can be very problematic should there be issues with the neutrals (even your neighbours) if fed from the same transformer and you are bonded to the common water main.. In summary you could disconnect everything and still have very high mag fields coming through your plumbing due to neutral issues (as the current must return in some way) in this case it would use your water pipe to do this. **This is an absolute mine field and should be investigated by a electrician who is very well versed in EMF if you are seeking a high degree of certainty on this issue.** A process of elimination must be undertaken that would include checking current on all conductors (comparing) inclusive of your earthing and water pipe etc.. If this is the issue (caused by feedback issues else where) - your only option may be to isolate your water pipe downstream of your meter by a PEX or approved non-metallic section and upgrade your earthing system (MEN + Earthing electrodes etc..) inclusive of your wiring (if an old installation). Assuming you have a decent (certified & calibrated) Mag meter - see if you get readings from your water pipe.

If it turns out to be none of the above (when all fuses pulled) - you could be experiencing the mag fields due to sharing a wall with the neighbour. There are products you could use to provide some degree of shielding however, will likely be a pain to retrofit (subject to the areas that need shielding). If you don't care how it looks then you can get certain foil based self-adhesive films. However, (with your installation active) shared neutrals can also create mag field issues..

There are also other issues - if you are in a older place say prior to & ~ 1960's they used Vulcanised Indian Rubber (VIR) which has other major potential issues. If it is an older installation it is very likely your light circuits will not be grounded. We still come across this issue in the older building stock in AUS.

What I'm trying to get across here is this may be a very complicated issue, where you will likely need an expert to investigate further to determine the actual cause via a process of elimination.

You may even have a nearby transformer or HV trans lines causing the Mag fields. Have a walk around with your meter and see what you get.. Without any specifics it is truly a guessing game. Best to investigate thoroughly (if possible with an expert in this area).

[@Anthony Smith](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/26765/) - may have some good ideas or further recommendations.

### Garry Kirk — 2024-07-09T18:01:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/fqs-nnemf-the-55th-latitude.29078/post-336878>

The building is earthed properly. Most in the UK are, unless they've been fucked about with tbh, that's going back a long time as well.
The bedroom reads 20-40 during the day, it drops when the fuses are taken out to 5-10. When I have been going to bed there is a reading as high as 180, it is coming from the next house. It is gone in the morning. Given the way magnetic fields pass through brick as if it's not there - as I have seen with household appliances, I can only assume she is running something when she goes to bed. The reading drops when I move towards the house on the other side. It's weird though as the bedrooms are downstairs (so this does shield RF from the tower quite well) but she's obviously running something downstairs in a bedroom, god knows what, as the reading isn't as high upstairs where the kitchen and liv rm are.

Tbh mate, I don't plan on staying here when I come back from El Salvador I don't think. I don't see the point in throwing money at this. If possible, I'd rather get away into something detached, pick the right place to begin with and go from there. Ideally something I could set the studio up in as well so I can fit people inn a good environment, sleep in a good environment and jus have to deal with the new fire station the rest of the time.

I think if I was just getting all these high readings all the time, I'd need to do something right now, but the magnetic field at night seems to be something to do with that house.

Hi Garry,
I was able to find some YouTube videos which explain the neutral return path issues (i mentioned above) and high Mag fields that could be coming from metallic water pipes etc.. This may or may not be the issue in your case, however you would have to check this further (e.g. mag field through the shared wall or plumbing). FYI or curiosity - there are equations (based on ampere’s law) you could use to calculate the the expected Mag field based on (measured) current either in a straight or loop conductor.

I have also attached the Building Biology evaluation guidelines, testing methods & testing conditions (SBM-2015).
Please be aware of what units you are measuring and apply any necessary conversions to compare against the units of measurements detailed within the SBM.

Note: the Seletun scientific panel (Circa 2010) recommended 1mG exposure limit based on risk for leukemia, brain tumors, Alzheimer‘s, ALS, sperm damage and DNA strand breaks \[1mG = 0.1uT or 100nT\]. These recommendations are for long-term continued exposure for many hours and days, not to brief exposures like driving under power lines etc..

Best to get something detached as you said.. When you inspect any new houses make sure you bring your meter/s and check.

All the best.

# Thread: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease & struggling with diet
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/non-alcoholic-fatty-liver-disease-struggling-with-diet.29084/>
**Subforum:** The New Monster Thread
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### healthy2015 — 2024-06-30T12:43:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/non-alcoholic-fatty-liver-disease-struggling-with-diet.29084/post-336294>

Hello

I have a close male relative that is looking for some advice.

He moved to the Canary Islands approximately 3 and a half years ago because he has had non-alcoholic fatty liver for years but is struggling to eat anything without him feeling awful or getting gout. He has tried many different diets and foods, he cannot eat shellfish or any fish at all (even though he loves seafood), duck, pork, beef, cheese, chicken, garlic, onions, dairy, bread, fruits because of fructose, bone broths etc, this is just a short list, it is actually most foods have some sort of effect on him.

When he does eat anything it completely changes him as a person within minutes and he becomes, low mood, snappy, unable to concentrate and unenthusiastic about anything in life in general and this can last weeks (some foods longer) which has a negative effect to his daily life. And this reaction is completely the opposite to how he usually is, sharp, enthuastic, determined, funny etc

He sees every sunrise and usually stays outside 2 hours after most days, all sunsets, eats most of his food outside, he has his skin in the game most of the time however he feels very lethargic when nude sunbathing, he is outside most of the day, does not have any blue light whatsoever after dark, when he does work it is on a grounded PC that has been tested with very low readings and has red screen. (iris and RubyLinth film). He drinks mineral water from a mountain in Tenerife.

He is constantly hungry as he has to limit what he eats which also makes him not very happy and what he does eat it is nowhere near enough for nutritional value, it’s quite concerning and is taking over his life. He has tried CT but again this has made him feel pretty much the same as when he eats the above foods, miserable etc! The worsrt thing is, is that he doesn’t get this reaction when eating crap like chicken nuggets & chips! Any advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

### Jack Kruse — 2024-07-01T16:04:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/non-alcoholic-fatty-liver-disease-struggling-with-diet.29084/post-336359>

Bazan long loop is broken. Until he fixes the eye and the DHA problem and gets his circadian mechanism right in the skin and eye he is not getting any better. Covered in many many blogs. Not sure why this is a question is someone who has been a member this long.

### healthy2015 — 2024-07-01T21:20:47+0300

I am so confused because I've heard so much about eye sight improving after staring at the red light with open eyes. This lamp is super strong, it's 630nm 670nm 850nm and has a lot of lights: [https://emr-tek.com/collections/red-light-therapy/products/inferno](https://emr-tek.com/collections/red-light-therapy/products/inferno) My friend said they recommend that for liability reasons. I'd so appreciate advice here. Where I live in Florida there is almost always a giant thick cloud ONLY in front of the sunrise and often sunset, as strategically put there so I need a lamp to improve my eye sight which started going down 4 years ago. Then there's the whole flickering thing... Thank you for your help!

### Mat.I — 2024-07-03T11:51:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/red-light-lamp-for-eye-health.29086/post-336499>

Watching the sunrise every morning with some (light) sun gazing at sunrise (until you build up tolerance) would be the best including at sunset.

Be outside as much as possible (no sunglasses)..

However, I have linked some red light research below.

### [Near Infrared (NIR) Light Therapy of Eye Diseases: A Review - PMC](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7738953/)

Near infrared (NIR) light therapy, or photobiomodulation therapy (PBMT), has gained persistent worldwide attention in recent years as a new novel scientific approach for therapeutic applications in ophthalmology. This ongoing therapeutic adoption of ...

 www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov

### [Red light irradiation as an intervention for myopia - PMC](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC9675534/)

Myopia is one of the main causes of visual impairment worldwide. Preventing myopia and providing myopia-related interventions are of paramount importance. Based on a thorough review of the available literature, we conclude that red light irradiation ...

 www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov

### [Morning exposure to deep red light improves declining eyesight](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/news/2021/nov/morning-exposure-deep-red-light-improves-declining-eyesight)

Just three minutes of exposure to deep red light once a week, when delivered in the morning, can significantly improve declining eyesight, finds a pioneering new study by UCL researchers.

 www.ucl.ac.uk

### [Red Light Improves Vision of Aging Eye](https://www.aao.org/eyenet/article/red-light-improves-vision-of-aging-eye)

Red light exposure enhances mitochondrial function.

 www.aao.org

### [A Study on the Effectiveness of 650-nm Red-Light Feeding Instruments in the Control of Myopia](https://karger.com/ore/article/66/1/664/833133/A-Study-on-the-Effectiveness-of-650-nm-Red-Light)

Abstract. Introduction: This study analyzed the effectiveness of 650-nm red-light feeding instruments in the control of myopia. Methods: In this study, 164 school-aged participants diagnosed with myopia in the city of Shenzhen were enrolled in a red-light feeding instrument study. Of these, 41...

 karger.com

Most recent review - [https://www.researchgate.net/public...ed\_NIR\_Light\_Therapy\_of\_Eye\_Diseases\_A\_Review](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/348124059_Near_Infrared_NIR_Light_Therapy_of_Eye_Diseases_A_Review)

# Thread: Cars with lowest nnEMF
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cars-with-lowest-nnemf.29087/>
**Subforum:** Redox Rx
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### TaylorF — 2024-06-30T23:20:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cars-with-lowest-nnemf.29087/post-336326>

Hi,
I'm looking to buy a car for the first time. I've found some information online, but nothing too specific. What are some cars/brands with the lowest nnEMF? Has anyone tested? I understand it is going to be on the older side.
Thanks!

### Anthony Smith — 2024-07-01T04:12:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cars-with-lowest-nnemf.29087/post-336334>

Every car model is different and can change from year to year. Some gas cars have higher magnetic fields because of the position of the alternator. You need a Gauss meter, take a test drive and measure. Odds are an older car will have no WiFi or Bluetooth which are probably the biggest concern, you also need a RF meter and measure. That said, some new cars you can turn off the WiFi & Bluetooth - ask the dealer/sales person. Don’t take their word for it have them prove it.

# Thread: HOW WE MADE THE OCEAN AND SUN INSIDE OF OUR CELLS.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-we-made-the-ocean-and-sun-inside-of-our-cells.29092/>
**Subforum:** Redox Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2024-07-01T15:12:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-we-made-the-ocean-and-sun-inside-of-our-cells.29092/post-336349>

What was not in the story of GENESIS?

The recipe.

This new blog tells the story of how cyanobacteria used chaos to change the Earth. There was a voice—Mother Nature's speaking to this creature. Do you think the beast listened?

There is a voice inside of you
That whispers all day long,
I feel this is right for me,
I know that this doesn't seem right.
No teacher, preacher, parent, friend
Or wise man can decide.
What's suitable for you--just a story of how cyanobacteria used chaos to change the Earth? There was a voice—Mother Nature was speaking to this creature. t listen to
The voice that speaks inside.
Don’t let the noise of others’ opinions drown out your inner voice.

The Great Oxidation Event marked the rise of oxygen in the early Earth’s atmosphere and is estimated to have happened between 2.5 and 2.3 billion years ago. It was critical in the creation of the eukaryotic cells and how these cells would control their cell cycle.

Oxygen in the form of the oxygen molecule (O2), produced by plants and vital for animals, is thankfully abundant in Earth’s atmosphere and oceans. However, researchers studying the history of O2 on Earth know that it was relatively scarce for much of our planet’s 4.6 billion-year existence.

So when and in what environments did O2 begin to build up on Earth? Stromatolite in Shark Bay, Western Australia. These stromatolites are thought to be some of the most ancient forms of life on Earth and are comprised of organisms that probably contributed to the O2 scientists are inferring existed on ancient Earth (e.g., cyanobacteria).

This event's implications allowed cells to bring the sea and sun inside of them to build further complexity. This is why matrix water and biophotons are now permanent fixtures in every creature on Earth today.

Don’t treat your life like a formula; you must spend ten years writing to have the following finite amount of time and maybe slightly better off.
This is misguided. Life is meant to be an experience. It's not something to be optimized by thinking 24/7 while on autopilot for the next ten years. You’ll figure out what you want by trying different things, by simple problem solving, by the process of elimination — not a formula.
The best thing about this is that you’ll look back on that decision you made and realize that they were what made the adventure possible; they made you feel fulfilled and overjoyed; it may be uncomfortable or even sad at times… but that’s what a journey is meant to be.
But I realize it’s hard to start. It’s hard to change the routine and break free. No amount of motivation will help unless there’s something practical to do.

So here is a place to start.
[https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-75-p53-106441242](https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-75-p53-106441242)

# Thread: Visiting El Salvador
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/>
**Subforum:** Meet and Greet
**Posts:** 38
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### drsongihan — 2024-07-02T04:12:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336408>

I "discovered" Jack Kruse not even 3 weeks ago, knew immediately that "this is it" (no, typically, I am not a believer and a good b.s. detector), became a gold member, just participated in my first webinar and now decided that I must visit El Salvador asap with my 14 yo son.
I live in Chicago and am a Chemistry Prof. I need to figure out ASAP whether my son who has developed severe catatonic depression and bipolar/mixed state in the past 4 years (it started around June 2020) and has not gone to school since 1 year will get better. During the summer, I have some flexibility with my job, but have to quickly decide whether there is a way to move my son down there since all of that has to happen before the Fall starts. He is so depressed that he felt life is not worth living. He was every day so incredibly angry at me. Today, I told him "Screw school. We are going to El Salvador!" His face lit up. I am not sure whether it was the "screw school" or the latter part. I was surprised since he is typically only angry at me, no matter what I say.

What would be the best place to start if I want to spend time with him at the Beach and the Volcano/Lake? I do need Internet because I need to execute my job.

I am maybe a bit too spontaneous, but do you know a good contact how to rent a place?

Does anybody know of a community where my son can plug into? Playing soccer? Learning Spanish? Doing something? Having fun? I mean, he did not smile or laugh for so long that I cannot even imagine what this may feel like but I trust that Jack is right and I hope and believe that my son will be well enough to start living again. But once he does, I would like to see which community I could plug him into?

I myself would love to learn Spanish. My 18 yo daughter will also come with me, but she won't stay long.

Any tips and support would be welcome.

Songi

### Jack Kruse — 2024-07-02T16:50:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336439>

Hopefully many of the people down there chime in here. I am going to post this elsewhere to stimulate input.

### Dr Rohen Kapur — 2024-07-02T18:14:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336449>

[@jackmck](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/26407/) does Maria Theresa have a couple of rooms available or know of anyone? Or a decent place for a teenager ?

There are several Airbnbs available, you could look on the telegram bitcoiners in El Salvador group

### [Telegram: Contact @bitcoinersinelsalvador](https://t.me/bitcoinersinelsalvador)

 t.me

There is the Encuentra 24 site for El Salvador ( if you use it in chrome/ brave it'll translate it for you) [https://www.encuentra24.com/el-salvador-es/bienes-raices](https://www.encuentra24.com/el-salvador-es/bienes-raices)

This is what I can suggest at the moment
The other option is to find an Airbnb and book it and plan from there. There are many in Atami and elsewhere. La Libertad has a wonderful fish market that sells oysters, lobsters and prawns at very decent prices which is a good thing to have locally.

If you prefer a long sandy beach Costa Del sol is worth looking at and [@Laudy Cincotta](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/24082/) is in that area. Beware of getting an Airbnb too near the transmitters. There's one here [https://maps.app.goo.gl/UacVDCqZQdodBpSM9](https://maps.app.goo.gl/UacVDCqZQdodBpSM9)

Thank you. That's helpful.

In the first 3 weeks, I am less worried because I will be traveling with him and can visit the beaches and volcanoes, including the ones you recommend.

What I am worried about is to figure out how to have my son learn Spanish ASAP and figure out a way for him to stay in that area over the Fall/Winter. The problem is that I have to work and go back and forth. So looking for how to find a more permanent place and some arrangement with a family/organization or something like that.

### tomstaplez — 2024-07-02T18:33:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336452>

I'm not much help, but the wife and I visited for 10 days back in November. We were always comfortable and the wife wasn't concerned about safety. Everyone was friendly even tho we only knew 6 spanish words. In general it felt 'third world' still, but loads of construction and tourism appeared to be getting a good foothold. Canada feels like we are heading to fourth world in comparison. I'd recommend ES, no regrets. You regret the things you don't do.

### drsongihan — 2024-07-02T19:18:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336459>

How do I contact Eduardo Aguilar or Jeremy Franco?

### pfedorow — 2024-07-02T19:34:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336461>

I usually get people to stay at Maria Theresa's place, as it is easy and helpful to get people acquainted. I am just not sure of the availability. You can contact her on WhatsApp at +503 7682 7715. She is perfect for first-time guests and can help with Spanish. If she is full we can recommend a few airbnbs in the atami area. There is a lot for your son to do on the beach surfing and swimming. The locals have kids events Saturday(el palmarcito) Sunday (zonte)in the morning

The accommodations are probably going to get tight for November here, so if there could be some joint sharing of ranchos, as we know few to rent in atami between 2k and 3k months for a 3-5 bedroom place.

### Laudy Cincotta — 2024-07-02T19:36:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336463>

> I live in Chicago and am a Chemistry Prof. I need to figure out ASAP whether my son who has developed severe catatonic depression and bipolar/mixed state in the past 4 years (it started around June 2020) and has not gone to school since 1 year will get better. During the summer, I have some flexibility with my job, but have to quickly decide whether there is a way to move my son down there since all of that has to happen before the Fall starts. He is so depressed that he felt life is not worth living. He was every day so incredibly angry at me. Today, I told him "Screw school. We are going to El Salvador!" His face lit up. I am not sure whether it was the "screw school" or the latter part. I was surprised since he is typically only angry at me, no matter what I say.
>
> What would be the best place to start if I want to spend time with him at the Beach and the Volcano/Lake? I do need Internet because I need to execute my job.

I mean, he did not smile or laugh for so long that I cannot even imagine what this may feel like but I trust that Jack is right and I hope and believe that my son will be well enough to start living again. >

>
> Songi

Hi my daughter and I live in Costa del Sol. We love it here.

We don’t have any of Jacks community down here and there isn’t as much population, no malls etc so far quieter than La Libertad or the capital.

We are 1.5 hours from La Libertad and 1-1.25 from San Salvador and it’s a very easy drive. We still meet up with people and it works for us.

If you’re looking for the community La Libertad is where you might decide to start.

Be prepared the beaches are all very hot. You can access internet everywhere so work shouldn’t be an issue.

You’ll find beach and surf communities and language opportunities in La Libertad and San Salvador.

I love your attitude & spontaneous decision making and glad your son showed some emotion about trying something different.

I’ll get to writing a longer post later today.

> I love your attitude & spontaneous decision making and glad your son showed some emotion about trying something different.
>
> I’ll get to writing a longer post later today.

Thank you. Amazing. Do you know any families with kids in similar age as my son? If you know of any Spanish tutors let me know.

### LEG — 2024-07-02T21:59:50+0300

> I live in Chicago and am a Chemistry Prof. I need to figure out ASAP whether my son who has developed severe catatonic depression and bipolar/mixed state in the past 4 years (it started around June 2020) and has not gone to school since 1 year will get better. During the summer, I have some flexibility with my job, but have to quickly decide whether there is a way to move my son down there since all of that has to happen before the Fall starts. He is so depressed that he felt life is not worth living. He was every day so incredibly angry at me. Today, I told him "Screw school. We are going to El Salvador!" His face lit up. I am not sure whether it was the "screw school" or the latter part. I was surprised since he is typically only angry at me, no matter what I say.
>
> What would be the best place to start if I want to spend time with him at the Beach and the Volcano/Lake? I do need Internet because I need to execute my job.
>
> I am maybe a bit too spontaneous, but do you know a good contact how to rent a place?
>
> Does anybody know of a community where my son can plug into? Playing soccer? Learning Spanish? Doing something? Having fun? I mean, he did not smile or laugh for so long that I cannot even imagine what this may feel like but I trust that Jack is right and I hope and believe that my son will be well enough to start living again. But once he does, I would like to see which community I could plug him into?
>
> I myself would love to learn Spanish. My 18 yo daughter will also come with me, but she won't stay long.
>
> Any tips and support would be welcome.
>
> Songi

Can’t add too much more than to say other than to emphasize that surfing is huge down there. It really makes it easy to get up at daybreak, it’s challenging and super rewarding, 14 years old is a great age to get involved, and you cannot use your phone easily when participating. Of course, you will figure it out when you get there. Your path will become clearer as your health improves too.

### Laudy Cincotta — 2024-07-03T01:30:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336486>

> [drsongihan said:](/goto/post?id=336472)
>
> Thank you. Amazing. Do you know any families with kids in similar age as my son? If you know of any Spanish tutors let me know.

It's a pleasure to help you, there are many people here on the ground as well as the Salvadorans who are warm, welcoming beautiful people willing to help so there will be no shortage of support.

Just get yourself and your son here and it will all fall into place, just trust the divine timing that led you to JK to save your child. Look at it as an adventure you never planned and it could turn out to be the best thing that ever happened to you all!

The homeschooling families are mainly in San Blas from my knowledge. I do know some and can reach out to them for info, they aren't JK members, lovely family that could be good connections, i will get back to you with info on that.

San Blas is not far from Atami, maybe 15-20 minutes from memory, the locals there can correct me but i am sure they will have alot of local resources in the area to help you.

There is a Spanish tutor in El Zonte called 'Say Zonte' the last i heard many people were happy with them so start there and there are a lot of locals in La Libertad so i have no doubt you will find a lot of help and advice.

Surfing could be a great way also to get him outdoors which is where he needs to be and he may start building a little community of friends through that also.

### Dr Rohen Kapur — 2024-07-03T14:11:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/visiting-el-salvador.29094/post-336503>

> [Pratima said:](/goto/post?id=336490)
